markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new LLM visibility strategy to match Outreach's updated positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LLM strategy is misaligned with Outreach's "AI Revenue Platform" positioning.** The current Scrunch prompt list is outdated, focusing on RevOps and SDR angles instead of core AI capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**GrowthX will reset the Scrunch tracker.** This involves retiring irrelevant prompts (e.g., security) and adding 15–20 new ones focused on AI forecasting, conversation intelligence, and deal execution.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**The reset is driven by CMO Holly's directive** for a GTM + LLM plan. A new internal "tiger team" (Hadassah, Becky, Andrea) will use this data to inform Outreach's narrative and analyst strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Outreach will provide updated artifacts** (messaging, personas, decks) to ensure all GrowthX content is aligned with the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Misaligned LLM Tracking

  - [The current Scrunch setup tracks 25 unique prompts across 7 LLMs (175 total tracked items).](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Core Issue:** The prompt list is outdated, focusing on RevOps and SDR angles instead of Outreach's new "AI Revenue Platform" positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Specific Gaps:** No prompts for core terms like "AI revenue workflow," "revenue intelligence," or specific AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Outdated Competitor List:** Tracks irrelevant players (e.g., Reply) while missing key benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Solution: Scrunch Tracker Reset

  - [GrowthX will reset the Scrunch tracker to align with Outreach's new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [**Prompt Curation:**](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Retire irrelevant prompts (e.g., security, BDR-focused).](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Add 15–20 new, high-relevancy prompts across three tiers:](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
        1.  [**Core Positioning:** "AI revenue workflow," "AI agents."](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
        2.  [**Future Differentiation:** Forecasting, conversation intelligence, deal execution.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
        3.  [**Competitive/Consolidation:** Pain point solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Competitor Focus:** Reduce the list to key players for leadership visibility: Gong, SalesLoft, Clari, Apollo, and HubSpot (for benchmarking).](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**Enhanced Reporting:** Add tags (e.g., funnel stage, persona) to enable more granular data filtering and analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Context: Leadership Mandate & Internal Alignment

  - [The reset is driven by CMO Holly's directive for a GTM + LLM visibility plan.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Internal "Tiger Team":** Hadassah, Becky (Comms), and Andrea (PMMs) will use the new data to inform Outreach's narrative and analyst strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Establish a clear POV on how Outreach appears in analyst reports and thought leadership, supporting the transition away from its RevOps-only perception.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Long-Term View:** Leadership acknowledges this is a "long game." For example, forecasting is a key focus, despite having only one current customer for that feature.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Supporting Actions: Content & Persona Updates

  - [Outreach will provide GrowthX with updated artifacts to ensure all content is aligned.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Materials to be Shared:**](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [Messaging and positioning document.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [First-call decks and persona-specific decks.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [Product explanation guides.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Persona Updates:** The current list (CRO, VP Sales, multiple RevOps) will be revised.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Proposed:** Consolidate RevOps roles and add Account Executive and CFO personas.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Action:** Outreach will provide the official, updated persona playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Future: Content Experiment Framework

  - [Once the tracker is reset and data is stable (est. 2 weeks), GrowthX will run experiments to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [**Experiment Cycle:**](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
    1.  [**Identify Gaps:** Find prompts with 0–2% presence/citation.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
    2.  [**Analyze Intent:** Use query fanout to see how LLMs interpret the prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
    3.  [**Create Content:** Write net-new content or refresh existing articles to target the identified intent.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
    4.  [**Measure Impact:** After two weeks, re-evaluate presence and citation for the targeted prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This framework provides a structured, data-driven method to directly test and improve Outreach's LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Share the consultant's LLM audit with Jo for comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [Send the proposed new prompt list to Outreach for review.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [Deliver the performance report by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the consultant's audit.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
      - [Reset the Scrunch tracker after artifact and prompt alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Maria:**](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Circulate compartment briefs to PMMs (Nora, Emily, Allie, Brenda) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/WGeQ4QbbUyKKW54MDy7kFhXZZaKJFrRb?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
